overall.description: Cyberpunk 2077 gameplay footage depicting a character traversing a dystopian urban environment at night. The character moves from a rooftop shanty settlement through narrow passages down to street level, navigating past burning trash, abandoned vehicles, and neon-lit streets beneath an overpass.

events.description: entering narrow building passage from open rooftop area

agents.ego_description: walking across rooftop shanty area and descending stairs through a narrow interior passage

entered.detail: tall futuristic towers with colorful neon advertisements visible in the distance
makeshift structure with rusted metal walls on the rooftop
stacked sandbags forming a low wall on the rooftop edge
descending staircase leading down from the rooftop level
close concrete walls of the interior building passage

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a rooftop shanty settlement with makeshift metal structures and sandbag barricades. Neon-lit skyscrapers dominate the distant skyline. The character walks forward and enters a narrow interior passage with close concrete walls, descending stairs toward ground level.

scene_state.functional_zone: shanty town courtyard with burning trash fires

events.description: exiting narrow building into open shanty courtyard with burning fires
beginning descent down concrete ramp to street level

agents.ego_description: navigating through shanty settlement past NPCs and burning trash piles, descending toward street level

notable_agents.action: walking past the camera on the right side of the path

entered.detail: rusted metal fencing surrounding the shanty courtyard area
large fire burning amidst garbage bags and debris

segments.scene_description: Exiting the building into a shanty courtyard illuminated by burning trash fires. The character passes NPCs walking through the area and navigates around a burning vehicle. The neon towers shift to the left as the character descends a concrete ramp toward street level.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban street under overpass with construction barricades

events.description: reaching street level and entering area beneath concrete overpass
passing close to burning vehicle on the left, temporarily blocking view

agents.ego_description: walking along street under overpass, passing construction barricades and abandoned burning vehicles

entered.detail: massive concrete highway overpass spanning across the street
red and white striped barriers lining the left side of the road
concrete wall covered in spray-painted tags and murals

segments.scene_description: The character reaches street level beneath a massive concrete overpass. The environment is dimly lit by street lamps, with construction barricades lining the path and graffiti covering the right wall. The character passes burning abandoned vehicles while the neon-lit skyline remains visible in the distance ahead.

events.description: emerging from under overpass into open intersection
navigating around abandoned cars scattered across the intersection

agents.ego_description: crossing through the intersection, navigating around abandoned vehicles and debris

notable_agents.action: figure walking ahead in the same direction across the intersection

entered.detail: open crossroads with multiple lanes and scattered debris
derelict car with doors open blocking part of the road
tall lamp posts illuminating the intersection

segments.scene_description: Emerging from beneath the overpass into a wide open intersection littered with abandoned vehicles and debris. Street lamps cast harsh light across the asphalt while the character navigates around derelict cars. A distant figure walks ahead as the neon skyscrapers remain visible against the night sky.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous descent from a makeshift rooftop settlement down into a desolate, neon-lit urban intersection. It begins amidst metal structures and sandbag barricades on a rooftop, moving forward into a narrow concrete passage and down a set of stairs. As the camera exits the building, the scene opens into a shanty courtyard illuminated by burning trash fires and a flaming vehicle before descending a concrete ramp. The environment then shifts beneath a massive concrete overpass, where the path is lined with construction barricades and graffiti-covered walls. Finally, the camera emerges from the shadows of the overpass into a wide open intersection littered with derelict cars and debris under the harsh glow of street lamps and a distant skyline of neon skyscrapers.
